feature-two-column-scene.props: {"headline":"Local Tasks","subhead":"Your private scratchpad","bodyPrimary":"Capture experiments and WIP privately, then promote to shared execution when ready.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"pictogram","pictogramType":"local","pictogramScale":1.22}

{"headline":"Local Tasks","subhead":"Your private scratchpad","bodyPrimary":"Track personal ideas without cluttering team boards. Local tasks stay visible to you and out of version control.","bodySecondary":"When work is ready, promote it to the shared project with one command and keep private drafts separate.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"local-tasks-demo"}

cue.label: Introduction
cue.voice: Keep private tasks off git and only promote them when ready. Perfect for drafting ideas and work-in-progress.

cue.label: Private Scratchpad
cue.voice: Sometimes you need to jot down ideas or track personal reminders without cluttering the team's shared board. Local tasks give you a private workspace.

cue.label: Promote
cue.voice: When your experiment turns into something real, promote it to the shared project with a single command. See everything together, or hide local tasks entirely.
